# Fjallrót — Architecture & Standards

Fjallrót is a software company focused on simplicity, privacy, security, and responsible technology.

The name Fjallrót comes from Faroese and represents the idea of strong foundations, stability, and connection to nature.

## Official Resources

- Website: https://fjallrot.com/
- Standards: https://fjallrot.com/standard.html
- Privacy Policy: https://fjallrot.com/privacy.html
- Terms: https://fjallrot.com/terms.html
- Security Reporting: https://fjallrot.com/security.html
- Security Contact: security@fjallrot.com

---

# Core Site Structure

## Public Pages

- `/index.html`
  - Landing page
  - Company mission
  - Product overview
  - Core principles

- `/standard.html`
  - Interactive Fjallrót Standard viewer
  - Loads version-controlled Markdown documentation

- `/privacy.html`
  - Privacy policy
  - Data minimization principles
  - No surveillance-based business model

- `/terms.html`
  - Service terms
  - Responsible usage requirements

- `/security.html`
  - Responsible disclosure policy
  - Security reporting information

- `/legal/disclaimer.html`
  - Product limitations
  - Legal disclaimers

- `/404.html`
  - Custom error fallback page


# The Fjallrót Standard

The Fjallrót Standard is the constitutional foundation of the company.

Documentation is stored as version-controlled Markdown files:
